german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant gap exists, with over half of positions accessible without German proficiency.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate, Leaving Customer-Facing Roles Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core PMs and Customer-Facing PMs, indicating a concentration in product management roles.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Market
seniority.subtitle: More than half of positions are filled by senior-level professionals, indicating a strong demand for experienced talent.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Limited Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of roles require on-site presence, with minimal flexibility for remote work.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 31% of roles require AI as a core responsibility, indicating high demand for AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Distributed Across Categories
industry.subtitle: No single category dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
